description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa upholstered in a muted blue fabric, featuring clean lines and a minimalist silhouette. The sofa has three individual seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be uniform in size and shape. The armrests are straight, boxy, and at the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a contemporary and structured appearance. The legs are short, black, and slightly recessed, providing subtle elevation while maintaining a low profile. The upholstery is smooth and solid in color, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching. This sofa would be well-suited for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or modern outdoor patios.
description: A modern blue three-seater sofa with straight armrests, uniform cushions, and short black legs. The design is minimalist, with smooth, solid upholstery and a boxy silhouette.
description_view_0: Front view showing three uniform seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the boxy armrest and the sofa's depth, with the backrest and seat cushions visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, flat backrest and the sofa's overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the armrest and the sofa's depth from the other side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual, uniform seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all appearing loose and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a minimalist, padded design and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, black legs positioned at the corners, slightly recessed, with a simple block style and no visible ornamentation.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with three attached, uniform cushions and no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
